intro: Layout Sketch 1 is a 96 hour event: 72 hour build + 24 hour FRC competition, open to high schoolers building a real robot under a hard deadline. Sponsorship funds the machines, materials, and workshops that make it possible — and puts your name in front of a room full of students who are about to become engineers.
why: Reach motivated high schoolers building real engineering skills under a hard deadline
Support STEM access for students without an existing robotics team
Build a recruiting pipeline with students who've already shipped a robot under pressure
Get visible, sustained credit in a tight-knit FRC / FTC / V5RC community

benefits.benefit: Sponsor swag in participant welcome bags

contact.name: Alex Li
contact.note: Want a custom package, or to sponsor with equipment or materials instead of cash? Reach out — we're flexible.
